overall.description: A first-person perspective ascending a snow-covered stone staircase on a stormy mountain during dusk, rendered in a game engine. Heavy snow falls steadily as the camera climbs between rocky cliffs and sparse evergreen trees in a cold, atmospheric mountain environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain staircase between rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the snow-covered stone stairs between rocky cliffs

entered.detail: snow-covered stone steps winding upward through the mountain pass
dark rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the right boundary of the path
large jagged rock outcrop visible in the distance on the left
dark purple-gray storm clouds with heavy falling snow

segments.scene_description: The camera begins ascending a snow-covered stone staircase flanked by rocky cliffs on the right and a large rock formation on the left. The stormy sky looms overhead with heavy snow falling, reducing visibility as the path winds upward through the narrow mountain pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mountain staircase with view of distant peaks

events.description: evergreen trees become visible on the left side of the path as elevation increases

agents.ego_description: continuing the steady climb up the mountain stairs, approaching the higher elevations

entered.detail: snow-covered pine trees lining the left side of the staircase
snowy mountain peaks visible through the storm in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Continuing the ascent, evergreen trees become visible on the left while the stone stairs lead higher up the mountain. The right cliff face dominates the foreground as the camera approaches the upper sections of the path, with distant peaks barely visible through the heavy snowfall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent up a snow-covered stone staircase that winds from a narrow mountain pass into a more open, forested cliffside. It begins by climbing between a large rock formation and steep cliffs under a stormy sky, where heavy snowfall limits visibility. As the camera continues its upward trajectory, the path opens slightly to reveal sparse evergreen trees emerging on the left. The scene then shifts to emphasize the dominating cliff face on the right as the stairs lead higher, finally revealing the faint silhouettes of distant peaks through the thickening snow.
